intent: A magazine-style product landing page: hero with one headline, two short value-proposition sections, a quote, and a call-to-action. The brand voice is editorial — generous whitespace, slow reading rhythm, vertical breathing room between sections.
features: two value-proposition sections with generous spacing between
notes: Critical: spacing_scale = 'spacious' and density = 'spacious'. The brief explicitly says 'generous whitespace, slow reading rhythm, vertical breathing room'. If the page ships with SaaS-dashboard-tight defaults (p-2, gap-2, m-1), the brand voice is broken regardless of palette/typography.
